name: Secret Ghost
original_name: บันทึก(ลับ)รักฉบับผี
overview: Sia, a college student, dreams of becoming a musician but struggles with an uncertain life. Things change when he encounters Blue, a senior from his club who has already passed away. Blue's presence brings both fear and unexpected emotions.
